{

  "seq": 18,
  "points": 1,
  "stem": "设 $X$ 是赋范线性空间，$d$ 是由范数诱导的距离，则对任意的 $x, y \\in X, \\alpha \\in \\mathbb{K}$，有 $d(\\alpha x, \\alpha y) = \\alpha d(x, y)$。",
  "options": [],
  "answer": "错误",
  "answer_raw": "错误",
  "explanation": "$d(\\alpha x, \\alpha y) = |\\alpha|d(x, y)$",
  "note": null
}
stem: 设 $X$ 是赋范线性空间，$d$ 是由范数诱导的距离，则对任意的 $x, y \in X, \alpha \in \mathbb{K}$，有 $d(\alpha x, \alpha y) = \alpha d(x, y)$。
explanation: 题干错误，因为由范数诱导的距离需满足 $d(\alpha x, \alpha y) = |\alpha| d(x, y)$，以确保距离非负；正确说法是 **$d(\alpha x, \alpha y) = |\alpha| d(x, y)$**。
explanation_raw: {"explanation":"题干错误，因为由范数诱导的距离需满足 $d(\alpha x, \alpha y) = |\alpha| d(x, y)$，以确保距离非负；正确说法是 **$d(\alpha x, \alpha y) = |\alpha| d(x, y)$**。"}
